creator: john@saltant.com
text:
Created attachment 193524
articles/committers-guide: Document "Sponsored by"

Problem statement
=================

1.  The "Sponsored By" line is not documented in the Committers' Guide, through it has been included in the FreeBSD-specific patch to the devel/subversion port since March, 2013 [0].

2.  Common practice for using the "Sponsored By" line does not handle well the case where a commit is the result of work by multiple individuals who typically have different sponsorship including some who have no sponsorship at all. In this case, a sponsorship credit tends to have the unintended implication that the work of all collaborators was sponsored and by the same sponsor, which is rarely the case.

[0] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/314983


Discussion
==========

A preliminary discussion of the problem statement and the concept for this patch took place on the freebsd-ports@ list [1].

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2018-May/113352.html


Proposed solution
=================

The attached patch contributes documentation (in English) to address both parts of the problem statement.


Translations
============

The Committers' Guide is offered in English, French, Italian, and Russian, so a full solution should include patches for the other three languages.
